secretQuote.name: McCree / Cassidy
secretQuote.quote: Lifeweaver: You're so old-fashioned, Reinhardt. A hammer? How marvelous!Reinhardt: I suppose you think I should have a giant laser gun.Lifeweaver: No, lean into it! Get Lindholm to build you one of his bigrobotic horses.*name*: What did you just say?
